subject: particles.star file not created for new species
body:
Hi all,

I am running the following command to create a new species 

MTools create_species \
--population m/g2.population \
--name ribosome \
--diameter 350 \
--sym C1 \
--temporal_samples 1 \
--half1 relion_ribosome/Refine3D/job007/run_half1_class001_unfil.mrc \
--half2 relion_ribosome/Refine3D/job007/run_half2_class001_unfil.mrc \
--mask m/mask_ribosome.mrc \
--particles_relion relion_ribosome/Refine3D/job007/run_data.star \
--angpix_resample 2.405 \
--lowpass 20 \
--ignore_unmatched

However, when I checked the folder
m/species/ribosome_b91790ab/

I noticed that ribosome_particles.star file had not been created. This file 
is expected when I try to run M refinement.  Any suggestions why this might 
be happening?

Cheers,
Juha
